ops.text:
VERIFY RESULT: CONFIRMED. $0 spend, pure compute. Independent recomputation (own byte-5-gram substring shingles + own Jaccard + own union-find; direct pyarrow reads) matches E21 on every headline number.

Distribution (exact match to report.json): sessions=813, pairs=6731, max_pairs_per_session=291, mean=8.2792, median=5.0, p90=17.0, gini=0.56901, singletons=151, top10=[291,185,141,139,131,75,54,48,46,44], label 3418 True/3313 False.

ESS (exact within-session pairwise, my independent shingling): J0.8 = 4019 clusters -> ESS_sum 4019.0, reduction 0.59709 (== headline 4019 / 0.597). Secondary J0.6=2989, J0.5=2641 — both exact matches to report.json. Independence corroboration: my raw byte-substring sets reproduce the pipeline's rolling-hash ESS to the integer, so no hash-collision artifact.

Parquet invariants (out/session-weights.parquet): 6731 rows, id unique, ids match train order, weight==w_ngram08, weight*cluster_size==1 elementwise (confirms weight=1/within-session cluster size), sum(weight)=4019.0 == n within-session clusters 4019, sum(1/cluster_size)=4019.0, rows_weight_lt_1=4214 (matches ledger). Invariant sum(weight)==4019==n_clusters HOLDS.

CSV out/global_near_dup_pairs_j08.csv: 4417 pairs, same_session mismatch=0 vs my independent session-of-id recompute; within=4281, across=136 (== report within_session_pairs / across_session_pairs; within_fraction 0.9692).

Bootstrap CI (SEED=1729, 2000 session-block resamples, own run): reduction CI [0.58566961975406, 0.6097381552484429] — identical to report.json to full float precision; ESS CI [3942.14, 4104.15].

NOTE (immaterial): headline states effective_sample_size_ci95=[3944,4104]; my recompute gives [3942,4104]. Upper matches to integer. Lower off by ~2 because the headline derived the count-CI from the rounded reduction bound (0.586*6731=3944.4) rather than the unrounded percentile (0.58567*6731=3942.1). Underlying bootstrap reduction CI reproduced exactly; a 2-count rounding on a CI endpoint is presentation, not a computation error.

CROSS-CHECK on the LSH caveat: report ngram_near_dup within_session_pairs at J0.6/J0.5 (7034/8372) come from the GLOBAL LSH candidate enumeration; my EXACT within-session pairwise gives 7039/8497 (more, as expected from LSH recall <1 below 0.8). This is exactly the ledger's own documented caveat and does NOT touch the headline: the ESS uses exact within-session clustering (within_session_weights), which I reproduced exactly at all thresholds. At J0.8 LSH==exact (4281==4281).

PROTOCOL/GOALPOST: success criterion evaluated as registered — parquet emitted (all 6731 rows), report carries the exact registered headline fields, raw artifacts under out/, point estimate + bootstrap CI provided. No headline field swapped; default scheme = pre-registered char-5-gram J0.8. PENDING-E15 respected: E21 results entry explicitly states no promote/kill verdict; all four options frame it as measurement feeding E28. No goalpost move detected.

Artifacts: verify_independent.py + verify_independent_report.json under /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E21/verify/.
